name: Downtown Davis
description: Historic downtown core — 2nd/3rd St corridor, City Hall, Farmers Market

name: Central Davis
description: Residential grid between downtown and I-80 — F/G/H streets

name: UC Davis Central Quad
description: Main UC Davis campus core — Mrak Hall, Shields Library, Memorial Union

name: UC Davis West Campus
description: West campus — Mondavi Center, barn area, Hutchison Field

name: UC Davis South Campus
description: South campus — student housing, South Hall, Tercero dorms

name: UC Davis Arboretum
description: Arboretum waterway, Putah Creek, Lake Spafford

name: North Davis
description: North of Covell Blvd — Covell Commons, Nugget, North Davis neighborhoods

name: South Davis
description: South Davis neighborhoods — Mace Ranch, Wildhorse, East Covell

name: East Davis
description: East Davis — Mace Ranch, Anderson Road corridor, grocery area

name: Campus Village
description: Student housing dense zone — Solano Park, Cuarto, Segundo dorms

name: Village Homes
description: Iconic passive solar planned community, west Davis

name: Old East Davis
description: Central-east residential — E Street, F Street, UC neighborhoods

name: South Campus / Olive Drive
description: I-80 edge, Olive Drive business strip, train tracks corridor

name: Community Park / Mace Ranch
description: Southeast Davis athletic fields, Mace Ranch, Mace Blvd area

name: Northwest Davis
description: Northwest neighborhoods — Stonegate, Patwin, Covell Park area
